summary: Iteration 4 testing complete: All edge case validation guards, auto-stage progression, SELLER_VERIFIED stage, notifications, dashboard KPIs, and inline action bar features working correctly. 14/14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing shows all features operational.
seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/reset to reset database. DEAL_WON RFQ (Ready-Mix Concrete, buyer GLID 3, seller GLID 3.1), DEAL_LOST RFQ (Teak Wood Panels), RFQ_SENT (Copper Sheets, buyer GLID 1) used for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features tested and working: Edge case validation guards correctly block actions at wrong stages (proforma on DEAL_LOST returns 400, payment/shipment/delivery on DEAL_WON returns 400, review on DEAL_LOST returns 400). SELLER_VERIFIED stage advances from RFQ_SENT when buyer verifies seller. Notifications endpoint returns activity feed with product info. Dashboard KPIs include in_fulfillment count. Full lifecycle auto-progression works: DEAL_WON → PROFORMA_SENT → PAYMENT_PENDING → PAYMENT_RECEIVED → IN_TRANSIT → DELIVERED → CLOSED. InlineActionBar shows context-appropriate actions: Accept/Reject Proforma at PROFORMA_SENT, Record Payment at PAYMENT_PENDING, Dispatch Shipment at PAYMENT_RECEIVED, Confirm Delivery at IN_TRANSIT.

backend_apis: Edge case: POST /api/rfqs/{id}/proforma on DEAL_LOST returns 400 ✅
Edge case: POST /api/rfqs/{id}/payments on DEAL_WON (before proforma) returns 400 ✅
Edge case: POST /api/rfqs/{id}/shipments on DEAL_WON returns 400 ✅
Edge case: POST /api/rfqs/{id}/delivery on DEAL_WON returns 400 ✅
Edge case: POST /api/rfqs/{id}/review on DEAL_LOST returns 400 ✅
frontend_features: SELLER_VERIFIED appears in pre-deal stage flow ✅
Verify hint card appears for buyer on RFQ_SENT when seller not verified ✅
InlineActionBar shows Accept/Reject Proforma at PROFORMA_SENT for buyer ✅
InlineActionBar shows Record Payment at PAYMENT_PENDING for buyer ✅
InlineActionBar shows Dispatch Shipment at PAYMENT_RECEIVED for seller ✅
InlineActionBar shows Confirm Delivery at IN_TRANSIT for buyer ✅
Using inline Accept Proforma advances stage to PAYMENT_PENDING ✅
Pre-deal actions (counter offer, accept quote, schedule meeting) still work ✅
Dashboard pie chart shows post-deal stages correctly ✅
Left panel is scrollable, right message panel has fixed height ✅
Dashboard In Fulfillment KPI displays correctly ✅

test_credentials: No auth required. URL params: ?view=buyer&glid=3 for buyer, ?view=seller&glid=3.1 for seller. DEAL_WON RFQ ID varies after reset. Use GET /api/buyer/3/rfqs to find current IDs.
known_working_flows: Edge cases blocked at wrong stages - 5/5 tested
SELLER_VERIFIED stage works via verify-seller API
Notifications endpoint returns activity feed filtered by GLID
Full lifecycle: DEAL_WON → proforma → accept → payment → confirm → ship → IN_TRANSIT → delivery → DELIVERED → review → CLOSED
InlineActionBar context-aware: shows appropriate actions per stage and user role
Pre-deal actions (counter offer, accept/reject quote, schedule meeting) work
Notification bell shows unread count and activity feed dropdown
